text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking past the training course some days later, I spot a familiar
figure dashing down the homestretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Silence Suzuka. Her trainer's nowhere to be seen, so I assume that
she's doing some solo practice.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush over to the collapsed Silence Suzuka to make sure she's not
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... s-sorry. I'm fine, really. My legs are just... feeling a bit heavy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Maybe not...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've been feeling strange ever since my last scrimmage race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It feels as if there's a ball and chain attached to one of my ankles.
And no matter how much I run, all I see is darkness...
choice_data_list: Maybe you're pushing yourself too hard.
Maybe you're pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Too hard? ...I don't think so. This was never a problem for me before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I used to be able to run without a care in the world. It was everything
to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But now... What should I do? ...I've never felt this way before.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've never felt like... like... I don't even want to run...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression in no way resembles that look of pure bliss I am so
used to seeing as she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fear that she's losing sight of her ultimate passion. There has to be
something I can do...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew! A quiet course all to myself... Running at night is the best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And maybe it's just my imagination, but the stars seem a little brighter
than usual tonight.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I've got this scenery all to myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, she spoke so fondly of her beautiful view that
evening. Perhaps Suzuka likes taking in the scenery?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
choice_data_list: Would you like to try running somewhere else?
Would you like to try running somewhere else?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Somewhere else?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A wonderful view...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Is there really such a place near the academy? I feel like I'm quite
used to all the sights around here...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Will you really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, I have just the place in mind. The surroundings are awash
with lush greenery, and there is plenty of wide-open space to run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The sky cleared up while we were on the train. There's so much
greenery, bathing in sunlight... It's beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And this path here... Just where does it lead?
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a run and find out?
Why don't you take a run and find out?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Good idea. I'll be back soon!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (My legs still feel a bit heavy. But...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...What a nice breeze. It's so cool and refreshing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay... I think I'll run a bit more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(The feeling of kicking up dirt with my feet... My body getting hot...
The cool breeze...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (This is it. This feeling... Running like this...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (This is my ideal scenery...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Absolute silence. With only the sounds of the wind and my own
beating heart. This world is mine...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And mine alone!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, very. It's been a while since I've been able to just run without a
care.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you... It made me remember...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I loved running like this even when I was little. One day, my parents
encouraged me to try running in a race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
As long as I was running, I was happy, so I agreed to the race... But...
it was really tough at first.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I was surrounded by other children... It was noisy, and I felt trapped.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So I ran... all the way to the front, where there was nobody but me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I needed to go somewhere away from the others, where they
wouldn't be able to catch up with me. So I ran as fast as I could... and
suddenly everything opened up in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It was... quiet. And I was alone. I reached a place nobody else could.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I... need to run in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I need to reach that place, even if it's just once more! I don't care
about anything else!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think I should tell my trainer exactly how I feel. That I can't run if I'm
not in the front.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... So maybe... Would you...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind accompanying me when I tell her? I'm not very good
at speaking, you see...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: S-so, please come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we return to the academy to talk to Silence Suzuka's trainer...
